platformProjects.name: Real-Time CDC Platform
platformProjects.problem: Enterprise order and ERP workflows depended on stale synchronization patterns that created reconciliation work and slowed operational decisions.
platformProjects.platform_move: Architected an event-driven CDC platform that streamed database changes through governed messaging paths and used schema-driven onboarding for new tables.
platformProjects.outcome: Processed 12M+ daily change events, reclaimed 12 operational hours per week, and reduced manual reconciliation pressure across downstream systems.

platformProjects.name: Zero-Trust Infrastructure Automation
platformProjects.problem: Cloud delivery needed stronger governance, safer deployment boundaries, and less dependence on broad, long-lived access patterns.
platformProjects.platform_move: Standardized Terraform modules, AWS OIDC federation, scoped IAM policies, private connectivity, and rollback-aware ECS/Fargate deployment paths.
platformProjects.outcome: Removed static deployment credentials, improved infrastructure repeatability, and gave teams a secure default path for production delivery.

platformProjects.name: AI Enablement Platform
platformProjects.problem: Internal AI and data prototypes were difficult to move from individual machines into secure, governed production workflows.
platformProjects.platform_move: Operationalized AI workflows with Databricks, Bedrock-backed RAG, MCP developer skills, CI assistants, and AIOps automation.
platformProjects.outcome: Improved Databricks pipeline development velocity by 40% and lowered incident MTTR by roughly 25% through targeted platform automation.

platformProjects.name: CI/CD Platform & Developer Tooling
platformProjects.problem: Delivery feedback loops were slow, deployment paths were manual, and quality signals arrived too late in the development cycle.
platformProjects.platform_move: Built faster CI/CD tooling with immutable builds, automated quality gates, containerized pipelines, and developer-facing failure feedback.
platformProjects.outcome: Reduced pipeline latency by 75% in earlier platform work and helped modern teams move toward 4-6 minute deployment cycles.

platformProjects.name: Customer Data Import Platform
platformProjects.problem: Enterprise customer onboarding needed secure, reliable migration paths for large relational datasets from external SaaS systems.
platformProjects.platform_move: Built a queue-driven import platform with Kubernetes workers, secure OAuth integrations, S3 multipart uploads, and tenant-scoped data boundaries.
platformProjects.outcome: Supported 400+ enterprise client migrations while preserving relational integrity and improving large-file ingestion reliability.

earlierProjects.name: CSP Cost Optimization
earlierProjects.details_txt: Decision-support model using Analytic Hierarchy Process techniques to reason about cloud service provider cost optimization and profitability tradeoffs.

earlierProjects.name: Anchor-Free Pedestrian Detection
earlierProjects.details_txt: Computer vision project using residual networks, anchor-free detection, and feature pyramid networks to improve pedestrian detection in challenging scenes.

earlierProjects.name: Indian Language Identifier
earlierProjects.details_txt: Speech classification project that identified Indian languages from audio features extracted from news clips.

earlierProjects.name: Credit Card Fraud Detection
earlierProjects.details_txt: Data science project for identifying anomalous transaction behavior in anonymized, imbalanced financial data.

earlierProjects.name: Chronic Kidney Disease Detection
earlierProjects.details_txt: Healthcare ML project exploring early chronic kidney disease detection from clinical indicators such as sugar, albumin, and hemoglobin levels.
